name: api-spy-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for the api-spy SDK, the React overlay, and the demo app.

scripts.lint: eslint packages/api-spy/src packages/api-spy/tests packages/api-spy-overlay-react/src packages/api-spy-overlay-react/tests examples/demo-app/src examples/demo-app/tests
scripts.test: npm run test:sdk && npm run test:overlay && npm run test:demo
